params.name: Wilson Cloud Chamber
params.description:
On Jul 25, 1895 AD, Wilson designed the first Cloud Chamber device.
The Wilson cloud chamber is named after its inventor, British physicist Wilson. It is said that the cloud chamber was originally invented because he wanted to reproduce the strange scene of the sun shining on the clouds in the laboratory. To this end, he designed a set of instruments that condensed water vapor to form clouds. In experiments, he found that when X-rays were used to illuminate the cloud chamber, cloud fog appear …
